records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, it's not painful at all. It's only tasty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, it's not painful at all. It's only tasty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it's not painful at all. It's only tasty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really all the weapons you have?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really all the weapons you have?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really all the weapons you have?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This can't be...! Count Slime has eaten all the weapons we had.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This can't be...! Count Slime has eaten all the weapons we had.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This can't be...! Count Slime has eaten all the weapons we had.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now, he can use those weapons against us. This is dangerous!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now, he can use those weapons against us. This is dangerous!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now, he can use those weapons against us. This is dangerous!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Misha. It's not over yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Misha. It's not over yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Misha. It's not over yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. We still have our secret weapon left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. We still have our secret weapon left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. We still have our secret weapon left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dr. Chaplin? What do you mean? Didn't Count Slime eat all our weapons?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dr. Chaplin? What do you mean? Didn't Count Slime eat all our weapons?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dr. Chaplin? What do you mean? Didn't Count Slime eat all our weapons?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Masked Counter! I'm sending you the Ultimate Secret Weapon Z now! Take it well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Masked Counter! I'm sending you the Ultimate Secret Weapon Z now! Take it well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Masked Counter! I'm sending you the Ultimate Secret Weapon Z now! Take it well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Secret Weapon Z, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Secret Weapon Z, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Secret Weapon Z, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see...! Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see...! Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see...! Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! A secret weapon? Even better! I'll eat it too and make it mine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! A secret weapon? Even better! I'll eat it too and make it mine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! A secret weapon? Even better! I'll eat it too and make it mine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You won't steal it so easily! Count Slime!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You won't steal it so easily! Count Slime!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You won't steal it so easily! Count Slime!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaah? We lost another weapon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaah? We lost another weapon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaah? We lost another weapon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! You talk big, but end up taking a blow! What's going on? Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! You talk big, but end up taking a blow! What's going on? Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! You talk big, but end up taking a blow! What's going on? Masked Counter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the greatest hero can't win without a weapon, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the greatest hero can't win without a weapon, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the greatest hero can't win without a weapon, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hero wins even at the most disadvantageous moment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hero wins even at the most disadvantageous moment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hero wins even at the most disadvantageous moment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? That line...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? That line...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? That line...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You! Even cornered, you still have the guts to act like that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You! Even cornered, you still have the guts to act like that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You! Even cornered, you still have the guts to act like that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that fun?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that fun?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that fun?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cap? How long have you been watching from behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cap? How long have you been watching from behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cap? How long have you been watching from behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I think I've been watching since the climax.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I think I've been watching since the climax.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think I've been watching since the climax.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't the plot a bit childish? It doesn't seem very realistic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't the plot a bit childish? It doesn't seem very realistic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't the plot a bit childish? It doesn't seem very realistic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely made for children. Guess it's perfect for a nitwit like her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely made for children. Guess it's perfect for a nitwit like her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely made for children. Guess it's perfect for a nitwit like her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Are you calling me a kid?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Are you calling me a kid?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Are you calling me a kid?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's probably okay, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's probably okay, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's probably okay, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't have a chance to watch stuff like this when we were younger. Might as well enjoy it now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't have a chance to watch stuff like this when we were younger. Might as well enjoy it now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't have a chance to watch stuff like this when we were younger. Might as well enjoy it now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, that's true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, that's true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, that's true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before leaving <color=#ffd34c>school</color>, I never even dreamt I'd be lying down and watching cartoons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before leaving <color=#ffd34c>school</color>, I never even dreamt I'd be lying down and watching cartoons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before leaving <color=#ffd34c>school</color>, I never even dreamt I'd be lying down and watching cartoons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well said! Sobin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well said! Sobin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well said! Sobin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Toys are a bit...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Toys are a bit...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Toys are a bit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cap...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cap...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cap...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? I'm glad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? I'm glad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? I'm glad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blegh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blegh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blegh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rain... I know what it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rain... I know what it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rain... I know what it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't have any information about the taste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't have any information about the taste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't have any information about the taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Not tasty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Not tasty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Not tasty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you're correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you're correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you're correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I'll kill you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I'll kill you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'll kill you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to take Sis back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to take Sis back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to take Sis back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, she is very important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, she is very important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, she is very important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I have no intention of losing to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I have no intention of losing to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I have no intention of losing to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think you can win after already losing to me once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think you can win after already losing to me once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think you can win after already losing to me once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't lose the person I care about... to something like Corruption.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Well said! Sobin!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well said! Sobin!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since we're at it, buy me the Masked Counter Secret Weapon series too! It's a limited edition and totally cool!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Toys are a bit...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Toys are a bit...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Toys are a bit...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't think about spending money on useless stuff like that. You don't even write in a ledger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's true. After paying for the medicine, the food budget is pretty tight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... it would be great to have one. Something like Masked Counter's secret weapon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then we wouldn't be chased like this, and we could make a lot of money to cover the medicine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cap...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cap...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cap...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, Eujin. I interrupted and you missed an important scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I've seen this episode before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That scene really stuck with me, so I keep watching it again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? I'm glad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? I'm glad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? I'm glad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what was the secret weapon... that defeated Count Slime?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blegh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blegh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blegh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's rain. It's probably the first time you've seen it, since you were just born.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rain... I know what it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rain... I know what it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rain... I know what it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't have any information about the taste.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't have any information about the taste.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't have any information about the taste.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've thought it the moment you started talking without ever learning how to speak.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you take someone else's power, you also get their information, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, no one tries to taste rain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Not tasty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Not tasty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Not tasty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The power of a Counter. That's definitely the best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you heard of the Masked Counter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A childish cartoon movie... that only kids like.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you're correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you're correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you're correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But just because it's a cartoon for kids doesn't mean there's nothing adults can learn from it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mean its shallow lesson that separates good and evil by actions... and saying how affirmation and cheers give power?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Such things are useless for adults, and the same goes for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, I'm not here to teach you using complicated words.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was a villain called Count Slime who devoured every weapon in the world. Do you know how he got defeated?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That glutton even ate a bomb. And BOOM...! He exploded.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Talking to humans is pointless, especially when the person I'm dealing with is as sly as you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once I've eaten Solovey, you'll be of no use to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I'll kill you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I'll kill you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'll kill you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hurting a powerless and tasteless human. Could it be a punishment for upsetting you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You lie a lot. You'll surely try to deceive or confuse me with your words.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And obsession and revenge. If I keep you alive, you'll just follow me around and try to interfere. So there's no reason to spare you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you've figured me out just from tasting me. It's so accurate that it's creepy, you know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to take Sis back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to take Sis back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to take Sis back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans rarely have anything more valuable than themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing you'll lose, you came alone. Does that mean this human is that important to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, she is very important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, she is very important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, she is very important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I have no intention of losing to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I have no intention of losing to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I have no intention of losing to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your way of thinking is different from other humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think you can win after already losing to me once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think you can win after already losing to me once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think you can win after already losing to me once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't matter how many times it takes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't lose the person I care about... to something like Corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't lose the person I care about... to something like Corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't lose the person I care about... to something like Corruption.
